[Page 2] [[page 2 confidence: 90]]
MIGUEL ANGEL GARCIA MACIAS
Pianist Composer Discoverer
and Ideographic Inventor
No. 324 Pino Suarez Avenue
VERACRUZ, Veracruz

                                        Veracruz, Veracruz
                                        March 19, 1950

To the President of the Commission of Scientific Investigation
of the United States of North America

                                        New York

Dear Mr. President,

          This is to greet you and at the same time to bring to your
knowledge the STUDIES which I permit myself to send to that Honorable Commission
of Scientific Investigation, because I believe that it is my duty to make
them available for the deep consideration of that commission over which
you so worthily preside.

          This deals with stratospheric aerostats (?)* or Flying** saucers
as people commonly call them, and which I believe your great Nation, making
use of ATOMIC force, possesses.  Before giving an exposition of my IDEA, I
want you to know of the Inventions which I have thought up by means of my
STUDIES as an IDEOGRAPHIC Inventor, and which have been REGISTERED and
PATENTED by other persons whom I do not know and which are the following:

                    "GOTE-GRADUNS" (DROP GRADUATION?)

          The "Gote-Graduns" was originated when I was making studies on
Atmospheric Graduations of the Earth and one afternoon it occurred to me
to graduate a Dropper.  The experiment did not cause me a great deal of
work since I was able to graduate it with ease, but the PLANS of my IDEA
were stolen from me and patented in your Nation.
                                             FRI - NEW YORK
          "AUTOMATIC SHOVELS" for Dump-Trucks (or Concrete-Mixers)***  APR 7  1950

          The Automatic Shovels originated when a party of Workers was
trying to fill a Dump-Truck in front of the Custom House of the Port.  I
took my watch and I was able to prove that the workers took a long time to
fill the truck since it took almost an hour and a half of continuous work.
Then I thought that the same Truck equipped with an Automatic Shovel could
do the same work in less time.  I set about drawing up the plans and I sent
them to Mexico to the Secretary of National Economy.  The plans remained there

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   *  These words are written "aereo-astactos extratofericos".  I think that
      the writer intended to write "aereo-estaticos estratoesfericos".

  **  The writer frequently uses capital letters when there is no apparent need
      for them.  I have retained them in the translation.

 ***  "Camiones de volteo", literally, "trucks for turning over or revolving".

[Page 3] [[page 3 confidence: 92]]
- 2 -

for eight months.  After that time, and after I had paid all my fees as an
Inventor of the said Apparatus, I received a reply stating that the said
Patent had already been given to another person whose identity I do not
know.

        "ROOMS FOR MEASURING OPTICS" for the Examination of vision.

        I have this study in my possession and have not REGISTERED it since
I need to prove some things in order to be able to put it into effect.

        "THE GRADUAL CENTIMETRIC MUSIC OF THE FUTURE" or the discovery of
Sound (15) composed for PIANOMETRICS, PHONOMETRICS, CENTIMETRICS and
DISCOPHONOMETRICS.

        I have finished this Study and the plans are in the TOWN LIBRARY
of this Port, as well as the Autophonics and the Euphonics of Alphabetic
Letters.

        The "FERROTACTOMETER and the FERROCEMACTOMETER" to eliminate Railway
collisions from a DISTANCE at Road crossings.  I extended this IDEOGRAPHIC
INVENTION to eliminate automobile collisions on Roads, but since I do not
have money I was not able to put it in PRACTICE nor to have it REGISTERED.

        "EXQUINOCIS" (?) of graduation, time and distance, in order to
determine the distribution and division of TIME on CLOCKS of the whole World.
This drawing is in the Town Library of this Port.

        Description of the STABILITY of SURFACE and the SUPERMEDIA (?) in
order to prevent the sinking of big Transatlantic liners, guaranteeing
the lives and interests of persons who travel, like those of Navigation
Companies of the whole World.

        The graduation and Illumination of the Wharves which load large
quantities of combustible materials, in order to eliminate accidents on the
Wharves during the loading and unloading of the same.

        Study of the MULTIPLES and the SUBMULTIPLES of Mechanized gears.
This study is correlated with Music since it deals with Universal mechanical
gearing or the gradual Centimetric Music of the Future.

                    "STRATOSPHERIC AEROSTATS"

        In this study enters Global Stability which the Globe has and
Semi-Global Stability which the Parachute has.  Uniting the two STABILITIES
into one, we find the superior Stability or the SUPER-STABILITY of bodies
in Air or space.  These apparatuses can be used in order to avoid Atomic
Explosion on the Earth, since the velocity is Greater than that of Light or
Sound in accordance with the quantity of Atomic Material which is used in
their fabrication.  These apparatuses can be thrown from the ground or from

[Page 4] [[page 4 confidence: 97]]
- 3 -

the Water since the Conic-Global or Global-Conic form permits it.

          The force that the said apparatus can develop can be compared
only with THOUGHT since this has no barriers on the earth such as mountains
and clouds in Space.  This apparatus can be used for the Study of the Stars.
This force is applied by means of stratospheric skyrockets placed at the top
or sides of this apparatus using Nuclear-Atomic force.

          I hope that my idea is Studied and approved by the said Commission
and may serve for the Progress of the Universe instead of its DESTRUCTION,
and for the good of all of us human beings who inhabit the Earth.

          My description is IDEOGRAPHIC, but I believe that it will be a
grain of sand which will help the SCIENTIFIC INVESTIGATION of that big
Nation.

                                        Cordially yours,
                                        Miguel Angel Garcia Macias

                                        Ideographic Inventor

                                        "FOR UNIVERSAL PROGRESS"







Translator:  Mrs. Sophia Saliba





                    3

[Page 5] [[page 5 confidence: 92]]
THE FIRST PHOTOGRAPHS OF A "FLYING SAUCER", OBTAINED IN DURANGO AT AN
              ALTITUDE OF 9000 FEET

(Caption under photographs)

          Mr. German Horacio Robles Jr., student at the National School of
Engineering, is one of the thousands of persons who have seen "with their
own eyes" the flying saucers or disks which have become the general topic of
commentaries and have given rise to the most varied hypotheses.  But at the
same time the young man himself is the first to have photographed those
strange apparatuses.  He observed one of them and was able to take its
picture against the skies of the city of Durango.  1.  Picture of the "flying
saucer" at an altitude of 8000 to 9000 feet above the streets of Durango.
The apparatus seems to be a double truncated cone, joined at its bases which
moves by something like jet propulsion and which displaces itself by changing
position in order to use its motive force in the direction desired, for which
reason it can be seen under apparently different forms.  2.  Conception of
Mr. Robles Jr., concerning the real form of the strange mechanical objects
drawn by him.  3.  Another aspect of the flying saucer.  4.  The future civil
engineer, Horacio Robles Jr. sketched in our editorial offices after having
reported his observations on the flying disk and after having handed over
the pictures of this apparatus which he had obtained.


(Page with five drawings is entitled "Wings and Propellers"

                                         FBI - NEW YORK

[Page 6] [[page 6 confidence: 52]]
THE FIRST PHOTOGRAPHS OF "FLYING SAUCERS", OBTAINED IN GERMANY AT AN
ALTITUDE OF 6000 FEET

(Caption under Photographs)

Dr. Dorian Horacio Robles Jr., student at the National School of
Engineering, is one of the thousands of persons who have seen with their
own eyes the flying saucers or disk which have-become the general topic of
commentaries and have given rise to the most varied hypotheses... At the
same time the young man planned as the first to have photographed those
strange apparatuses. The observed one of them and was able to take his
picture against the skies of the city of Durango. 1. Balance of the flying
saucer, at an altitude of 4000 to 6000 feet above the streets of Durango.
The apparatus seems to be a double-truncated cone, joined at its bases which
moves in something like jet propulsion and stabilizes itself by changing
position in order to use the polar forces in one direction desired, for which
reason it can be seen apparently at different forms. 2. Consisting of
the bodies of, concealing the real form of the strange mechanical objects
seen by him. 3. Angular aspect of the flying saucer. 4. The future's civil
engineer, Horacio Robles Jr. sketched in an ashtray those after having
reported his observations on the flying disk and after having handed over
the pictures of the apparatus which he had obtained.

(case with five drawings is entitled "Wings and Propellers"

[Page 7] [[page 7 confidence: 72]]
MIGUEL ANGEL GARCIA MACIAS.
Pianista Compositor Descubridor
'e Inventor Ideógrafo.
Av.Pino Suarez Núm.324.
VERACRUZ.Ver.-

         H. Veracruz.Ver.,a 19 de Marzo de 1950.

Co.Presidente de la Comisión de Investigación Científica de
        Estados Unidos de Norte America.

                                              Nueva York.

Muy apreciable y distinguido señor Presidente.

     La presente es para saludarle y al mismo tiempo, para hacer de
su conocimiento sobre los ESTUDIOS que me permito remitir a esa
Honorable Comisión de Investigación Científica, porque creo ser mi
deber ponerlos a la alta consideración de la que usted dignamente
presíde.
     Se trata sobre los Aereo-astactos extratofóricos o sean los
platos Voladores como vulgarmente nombren las gentes y que yo cre
esa gran Nación los posee,aprovechando la fuerza ATOMICA,antes de
hacer una exposición de mi IDEA, quiero que sepa usted de los In-
ventos que he idealizado por medio de mis ESTUDIOS como Inventor
IDEOGRAFO y que han sido REGISTRADOS Y PATENTADOS por otras perso
nas que yo desconozco y son los siguientes:
                    "GOTE-GRADUNS"
     El Gote-Graduns nació cuando yo estaba haciendo Estudios sobre
Graduaciones Atmosféricas y de la Tierra y una tarde se me ocurrió
graduar un Gotero el experimento no me causó gran trabajo,pues pu-
de graduarlo con facilidad, pero los PLANOS de mi IDEA me fueron
robados y Patentados en esa Nación.
              "Las PALAS AUTOMACICAS"  para Camiones de Volteo.
     Las Palas Auto-máticas nació cuando frente al Edificio Aduana
de este Puerto una partida de Obreros trataba de llenar un Camión
de Volteo,tomé mi reloj y pude comprobar que el tiempo que demo-
ravan dichos Obreros para llenar el Camión hora mucho,pues casi
llegaba a una hora y media de trabajo continuo,entonces pense que
ese mismo Camión dotado de un Recojedor Automático,podría hacer
el mismo trabajo en menos tiempo,me puse Hacer los planos y los
mandé a México a la Secretaría de Economía Nacional,los planos es-
tubieron serca de Ocho meses,después de dicho tiempo y de haber
pagado todos mis derechos como Inventor de dicho Aparato se me
contestó que dicha Patente ya había sido dada a otra persona la
cual desconozco.
              "LAS SALAS de OPTICA GRADUAL" para el Examen de la
vista.
     Este Estudio lo tengo en mi poder sin REGISTRAR,pues necesi-
to comprobar algunas cosas,para poderlo llevar a efecto.

          "LA MUSICA GRADUAL CENTIMETRICA DEL FUTURO" o sea
el descubrimiento del Sonido (15) compuesto por la PIANOMETRIA,
FONCMETRIA, CENTIMETRIA y la DISCOFONCMETRIA.
     Este Estudio lo tengo terminado y los cuadros se encuentran
en la BIBLIOTECA del PUEBLO de este Puerto,así como la Auto-fonía
y Eufonía de las Letras Alfabeticas.
                                                    al frente..........#

[Page 8] [[page 8 confidence: 72]]
Hoja número 2.

El "FERROTACTOMETRO y el FERROCEMACTOMETRO" para evitar los
choques de los Ferrocarriles por DISTANCIA en los cruces de las Vias
este INVENTO IDEOGRAFO lo amplió para evitar los choques de los Au-
tos en las Carreteras,pero como yo no tengo dinero no lo he podido
poner en PRACTICA ni hacer el REGISTRO del mismo.

"EXQUINOCIS" de graduación,tiempo y distancia,para precisar
la distribución y repartición del TIEMPO en los RELOJES de todo el
Mundo,este cuadro se encuentra en la Biblioteca del Pueblo de este
Puerto.

Descripción de la ESTABILIDAD de SUPERFICIE y la SUPER-MEDIA
para evitar el undimiento de los grandes Trasatlánticos,garantizando
vida é Intereses de las personas que viajan,así como la de las Cias.
de Navegación en todo el Mundo.
     La graduación ó Iluminación de los Muelles que cargon gran
cantidad de Combustible,para evitar accidentes en los Muelles de la
garga y descarga de los mismos.
     Estudio de los MULTIPLES y SUB-MULTIPLES de los engranajes
Mecánidos,este estudio tiene correlación con la Musica por tratarse
del engranaje Universal mecánico ó sea la Musica gradual centimétri-
ca del FUTURO.

"AEREOSTATOS EXTRATRESFERICOS"

     En este estudio entra la Estabilidad-Global que tiene el Globo
y la Estabilidad Semi-Global que tiene el Paracaidas,juntando las
dos ESTABILIDADES en una sola,encontramos la Estabilidad superior o
sea la SUPER-ESTABILIDAD de los cuerpos en el Aire ó espacio.estos
aparatos se pueden usar para evitar la Exploción Atómica en la Tie-
rra,puesto que velocidad es Mayor a la de la Luz ó el Sonido de
acuerdo con la cantidad de Matérias Atómicas que se empleen en su fa
bricación.Estos aparatos pueden ser arrojados desde la tierra o des
de el Agua porque la forma Global-Cónica ó Cónica-Global se lo per-
mite.

     La fuerza que pueden desarrolar dichos aparatos solo se puede
comparar con el PENSAMIENTO porque este no tiene barreras en la tie-
rra como montañas y nubes en el Espacio,estos aparatos pueden emplo-
arse para los Estudios de los Astros,esta fuerza se aplica por medio
de cohetes extratgéricos aplicados a dichos aparatos en la parte su
perior del mismo ó en los costados,aprovechando la fuerza Nuclear.
Atómica.

     Espero que mi idea sea Estudiada y aprobada por dicha Comisi
-ón y sirva para el Progreso Universal en voz de la DESTRUCCION,y en
bien de todos los seres humanos que habitamos en la Tierra.
     Mi descripción es IDEOGRAFICA, pero creo será una grano de
arena que ayudará a la INVESTIGACION CIENTIFICA de esa gran Nación.
               De usted muy atentamente.
          "POR EL PROGRESO UNIVERSAL"
               El Inventor Ideógrafo.


               Miguel Angel Garcia Macias.

[Page 9] [[page 9 confidence: 72]]
Miguel Angel Garcia Macias.

PRESIDENTE Y GERENTE:                                                                                    DIRECTOR:
LIC. MIGUEL LANZ DURET          MEXICO, D. F., JUEVES 16 DE MARZO DE 1950          GREGORIO LOPEZ Y FUENTES          NUMERO 12,096

Las Primeras Fotografías de un "Plato Volador", Logradas en Durango a Nueve mil Pies de Altura

[THREE PHOTOGRAPHS: Two dark photographs on left showing circular objects in sky, one diagram on upper right showing diamond/lens-shaped object with labeled planes]

3o Plano.
2o Plano
1er Plano
2o Plano
3o Plano

El señor Germán Horacio Robles, Jr., pasante de la Escuela Nacional de Ingeniería, es uno de los miles de personas que han visto "con sus propios ojos" los platos o discos voladores que se han convertido en el tema general de los comentarios y dado lugar a las más variadas hipótesis. Pero al mismo tiempo es el propio que el primero en haber fotografiado con extraños aparatos. Observó uno de ellos y pudo captarlo sobre los cielos de la ciudad de Durango.—1. Gráfica del "plato volador" a 8,000 ó 9,000 pies de altura sobre las calles durangueñas. El aparato parece un doble cono truncado unido por la base, que se impulsa por algo parecido a la propulsión a chorro y que se desplaza cambiando de posición para aprovechar la fuerza motriz en la dirección deseada, motivo por el cual puede vérsele con diversas formas aparentes.—2. Concepción del señor Robles Jr., dibujada por el mismo acerca de la forma real de los extraños dispositivos mecánicos.—3. Otro aspecto del plato volador.—4. El futuro ingeniero civil, Horacio Robles, Jr., retratado en nuestras oficinas de redacción, después de informar acerca de sus observaciones del disco volador y de entregar las gráficas del mismo aparato logradas por él.
